title: Sadras Koyan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Confederation |image= |name=Sadras Koyan |homeworld=[[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' |birth= |death=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] ('''75'''), [[Centerpoint Station]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=Short |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Five Worlds]] *[[Confederation]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I don't say this often, Koyan, but I'll say it now. You're an idiot.''"
"''Which makes you an even more exceptional idiot, for saying it to the man with the most destructive weapon ever created.|Phennir and Sadras Koyan|}} '''Sadras Koyan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] and the [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] of that [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He was a wide-shouldered man with thinning hair, and a member of the [[Centerpoint Party|Centerpoint political party]]. During a meeting with [[Dur Gejjen]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and other members of [[Five Worlds]], he announced that he had approved the assassination attempt on [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]]'s life.''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' He was later elected [[Five World Prime Minister]] by a majority of the other Heads of State and signaled that he wanted to defect to the Alliance. The defect attempt was a trap as Centerpoint fired on both fleets destroying all but the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] and a few starfighters. After showing that Centerpoint was operational, he demanded from [[General/Legends|General]] [[Turr Phennir]] that the Corellian system be given the supplies they needed which was denied. During the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]], Koyan was informed by his [[Minister of Information (Five Worlds)|Minister of Information]] [[Denjax Teppler]] that [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] attackers were personally heading for him and that he had a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ready waiting for him at [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]] [[Epsilon 34G]]. Koyan tried to make a hasty retreat from Centerpoint to avoid capture, but instead of a shuttle waiting for him, he found a [[Chinnith|different one]] from the Galactic Alliance and was shot in the chest by its [[Chev]] pilot, instantly killing him. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}} *[[Legacy of the Force: Exile (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Exile'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' *[[Legacy of the Force: Fury (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Fury'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Five World Prime Minister]] |years=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] |before=[[Triumvirate (Corellian)|Triumvirate]] |after=TBA }} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sadras Koyan }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Koyan, Sadras}} [[Category:Confederation officials]] [[Category:Corellian nationals]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Planetary leaders]] [[Category:Tralusians]]
